arts.ttl: Tottenham v Elfsborg, Rangers v Union Saint-Gilloise, and more: Europa League – live
arts.sum: Updates from the final round of league-phase matches Join Michael Butler for Steaua v Manchester United Live scoreboard | How they stand | Email Scott Here’s how the mega-table looks going into the final matchday of the league phase. There are 36 clubs playing 18 fixtures to determine which eight qualify automatically for the Round of 16 and which 16 go into the play-off round. Enjoy, enjoy. FCSB (or Steaua Bucharest in the old money): Tarnovanu, Mihai Popescu, Ngezana, Dawa, Cretu, Edjouma, Sut, Radunovic, Tanase, Birligea, Miculescu. Subs: Udrea, Stefanescu, Daniel Popa, Chiriches, Toma, Baluta, Pantea, Musi, Alhassan. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Rangers man on verge of Ibrox exit – Deal and personal terms agreed, on site to finalise move
arts.sum: Rabbi Matondo is on the verge of leaving Rangers to join Hannover 96 on loan until the end of the season. That’s according to journalist Florian Plettenberg, who reports the winger is already on site with the German side ready to complete the move from Ibrox. arts.ttl: Rangers vs Union SG – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Rangers host Union SG in the Europa League this evening with both teams harbouring ambitions of breaking into the top eight. A late defeat at Manchester United leaves Rangers 13th in the standings, three points outside the automatic Round of 16 places. Union SG arrive in Scotland in 15th, behind Rangers on goal difference. arts.sum: There’s a claim in the Turkish media that Besiktas are still trying to sign Rangers defender Rıdvan Yılmaz after being linked with him throughout this transfer window. There have been reports in recent weeks that Rangers could offload the Turkey international despite Philippe Clement starting him in the past six league games.
